997 ANTBTC_ADMSN_CD ANTBTC_ADMSN_CD O0110H3A Other: IV - Antibiotics (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received antibiotic IV medications days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
